title: Job Opening Category Manager at Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
